candidates.why: Direct total revenue line; clear top-line and matches Net Sales values.

candidates.row_label: Capital gains on sales of tangible and intangible assets
candidates.why: Non-operating/other income, not revenue.
Direct sales line; also clear top-line and identical to Total Revenue here.

variables.notes: Using revenue priority list: prefer the more specific operating sales label first, with Total Revenue as fallback if label changes by year.

candidates.why: Direct cost of goods sold / merchandise cost line immediately below revenue.
Broad overhead bucket containing selling/admin-type external costs; appropriate SG&A component.
Selling expense component, but likely a subcomponent of Other External Expenses, so avoid double counting if broader row is used.
Core operating overhead/personnel cost component.
Small additional operating overhead bucket; not a total/subtotal.
Balance sheet liability, not income statement SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total line exists. Selected best overhead buckets while excluding likely nested subcomponent 'Other Selling Expenses' to avoid double counting, and excluding D&A.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization, not current-period R&D expense; should be excluded from XRD.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Capitalized Expenditure for Development, Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Capitalized Expenditure for Development, Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balance sheet balancing line, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No clear R&D expense line is reported in the provided statements. Supplemental amortization of capitalized R&D is excluded per rules.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost total; acceptable fallback if no specific interest line is available.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Liabilities to Credit Institutions
candidates.why: Most direct specific interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses on other financial liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest expense component.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest expense component.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest; lower priority than main reported line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Liabilities to Credit Institutions
Interest expenses on other financial liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Priority list for changing labels over time: specific interest expense rows first, broad financial expenses as fallback.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders
candidates.why: Preferred owner/parent equity line excluding non-controlling interests.
Includes non-controlling interests, so inferior for BE when parent equity exists.
Balancing line, not equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line, not equity.
Total balance sheet, not book equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to Parent Company shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred BE line because it excludes non-controlling interests, avoiding double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit, not balance sheet minority interest stock.
Direct balance sheet NCI line.
Alternative balance sheet label for same concept.
Income statement profit allocation, not balance sheet MIB stock.

variables.notes: Using balance sheet NCI labels only; income statement minority interest rows are period profit allocations, not the stock measure.
